useCases.name: One flow for lead generation
useCases.pain: My lead-gen pipeline spans 5 tools (capture, enrichment, SDR agent, Slack, CRM) — keeping data in sync is a nightmare.
useCases.solution: One workflow connects every platform and agent via MCP; data flows end to end and stays tracked in monday.

beforeAfter.description: From isolated agents to a team that ships together — in full view.
From locked-in tools to an open ecosystem — agents plug in, monday plugs out.
From risky adoption to confident rollout.
